summary: Senior Staff Software Engineer with 15+ years of experience building scalable, high-performance web applications and frontend platforms. Expertise in JavaScript, TypeScript, React, and modern build tooling, with a strong focus on performance optimization, accessibility (WCAG), and scalable component architectures. Proven leader who mentors engineers, drives engineering best practices, and delivers responsive, enterprise-grade applications for global organizations including Google, Amazon, and Walmart.

experience.title: Senior Staff Software Engineer
highlights: Developed an AI-powered search interface for a public policy platform using TypeScript and REST APIs, implementing markdown parsing, citation rendering, and end-to-end testing with Cypress.

experience.title: Senior Staff Software Engineer
highlights: Built responsive enterprise web platforms for global clients including Google, Amazon, Walmart, and Johnson & Johnson, supporting millions of monthly users.
Managed and mentored two frontend engineers, conducting weekly 1:1s, performance reviews, and technical guidance to improve team productivity and code quality.
Designed scalable frontend component architectures using atomic design methodology, enabling reuse across multiple enterprise client platforms.
Improved web performance by optimizing Core Web Vitals (FCP, LCP, CLS, TBT), increasing Lighthouse performance scores by 20% across multiple client platforms.
Followed content accessibility guidelines and standards, ensuring sites were compliant for OS screen reader and Chrome Lighthouse accessibility tests. Improved accessibility rating by 15%.
Produced a vendor portal that provided users ability to manage office work space environments.
Created a publisher feedback interface for the Brightspot CMS content preview window.
Implemented Google Tag Manager on client sites and set up a scalable solution for pushing data to the data layer.
Contributed to client's frontend component library, providing rich CSS animated experiences.
Utilized BEM principles in HTML Handlebars files.
Leveraged Less and Sass preprocessors to provide a more maintainable CSS codebase.
Wrote custom classes in both vanilla JavaScript and TypeScript.
Used Webpack to validate, manage, and build packages and libraries; leveraged Webpack to make code modular and improve site performance and code usability.
Created quality prototypes on tight timelines.
Assisted back-end developers in coding and troubleshooting.
Followed atomic design methodology for sites scaled out to all of the client's product sites.
Worked closely with design teams to retrofit existing websites with responsive layouts for mobile devices.

experience.title: Editor – Software Engineer
highlights: Developed frontend features for high-traffic news, sports, and lifestyle properties.
